pi_items.source: Verified from task description and setup_task.sh script.
Calculated by adding the initial 25 shares and the newly purchased 25 shares described in the task.
Verified as the evaluation threshold explicitly checked in verifier.py.
Verified against the specific target date requested in the task description.
Verified against the specific comment text requested in the task description.
Verified as the output file path generated by setup_task.sh and checked by export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires consolidating stock positions for NVDA. The portfolio data is synthetically generated by setup_task.sh. The expected consolidated units (50.0) and expected weighted average price (600.00) have been independently recalculated and verified based on the initial position of 25 shares at $615.30 and the new purchase of 25 shares at $584.70. The target portfolio file path, required date ('Feb 15, 2024'), and expected comment ('Average Cost Merge') have also been verified against the task scripts and requirements.
